atoms.docstring_summary: Fit circles through triples of points in the x,y-plane.
Determine the z-direction of helix motion between two points.
Find the nearest point on each helix to a reference point.
Compute helix pitch from two points when the circle center is known.
Compute optimal helix pitch from three points via least-squares.
Applies a dedispersion kernel to input data using a pre-computed delay table, transforming the data across different dispersion measure (DM) steps.

authoritative_sources.notes: Upstream implementation is mapped to the vendored astroflow repository.

review_limitations: The wrapper publishes a deterministic 2D output signal with shape `(dm_steps, down_ndata)` and local averaging over the frequency channels.

atoms.docstring_summary: Compute periodic friends-of-friends cluster labels for a point cloud.

authoritative_sources.notes: Upstream implementation is mapped to the vendored jFOF repository.

review_limitations: The wrapper publishes integer cluster-root labels derived from a local union-find pass over SciPy neighbor pairs.

atoms.docstring_summary: Compute a topological loss measuring local cluster consistency.

authoritative_sources.notes: Upstream implementation is mapped to the vendored jFOF repository.

review_limitations: The published contract is a deterministic scalar loss wrapper over local logits and neighbor indices; it does not expose a larger training-loop API.

atoms.docstring_summary: Map a subgraph onto lattice coordinates deterministically.

authoritative_sources.notes: Pasqal molecular-docking workflow attribution already attached in local references.

review_limitations: The wrapper deterministically projects mapped molecular edges onto a lattice graph and preserves only edges allowed by the supplied lattice.

atoms.docstring_summary: Sample MWIS candidates with the source Pulser neutral-atom adiabatic solver.

authoritative_sources.notes: Pasqal molecular-docking quantum MWIS path delegates to the Pulser neutral-atom sequence and state-vector sampling helper validated in optional backend tests.

review_limitations: Requires the documented Pulser/emulator optional dependency group for runtime quantum backend execution.

atoms.docstring_summary: Extract deterministic embeddable node mappings from a graph.

authoritative_sources.notes: Pasqal molecular-docking workflow attribution already attached in local references.

review_limitations: The wrapper publishes deterministic singleton node-to-lattice mappings for the first sorted graph nodes, capped by graph size.

atoms.docstring_summary: Compute Signal-to-Noise Ratio (SNR) of a periodic profile.

authoritative_sources.notes: Broad pulsar-search background already attached in local references.

review_limitations: The published score is the wrapper's log peak-to-absolute-mean ratio, not a variance-normalized detection statistic.

atoms.docstring_summary: Apply frequency-dependent delay correction to align a 2D spectrogram across channels.

authoritative_sources.notes: Broad pulsar-search background already attached in local references.

review_limitations: Channel alignment is implemented with integer sample shifts and zero-fill padding rather than interpolation.

atoms.docstring_summary: Compute frequency-dependent propagation delay from a medium's Dispersion Measure (DM).

authoritative_sources.notes: Broad pulsar-search background already attached in local references.

review_limitations: The wrapper exposes a simplified DM-delay formula with an explicit zero-frequency guard.

atoms.docstring_summary: Fold a 1D signal at a known period to build a phase-averaged periodic profile.

authoritative_sources.notes: Broad pulsar-search background already attached in local references.

review_limitations: Only complete periods are folded; trailing samples shorter than one period are discarded.

atoms.docstring_summary: Scores Dispersion Measure (DM) candidates for pulsar detection.

authoritative_sources.notes: Broad pulsar-search background already attached in local references.
Upstream implementation is mapped to the vendored Pulsar_Folding repository.

review_limitations: The wrapper publishes a per-candidate score array, not a pruned candidate subset.

atoms.docstring_summary: Performs a brute-force shift search to maximize the signal-to-noise ratio of a folded profile.

authoritative_sources.notes: Broad pulsar-search background already attached in local references.
Upstream implementation is mapped to the vendored Pulsar_Folding repository.

review_limitations: The wrapper returns the best rolled profile rather than a reduced candidate set.

atoms.docstring_summary: Subtracts instrument-induced artifacts across frequency channels using interpolative splines.

authoritative_sources.notes: Broad pulsar-search background already attached in local references.
Upstream implementation is mapped to the vendored Pulsar_Folding repository.

review_limitations: The wrapper subtracts a smoothed baseline from the input array.

atoms.docstring_summary: Computes the angle between two vectors.

authoritative_sources.notes: Upstream implementation is mapped to the vendored skyfield repository.

atoms.return_annotation: tuple[float, float, float, float, float, float]
atoms.docstring_summary: Computes spherical coordinates and their instantaneous rates.

authoritative_sources.notes: Upstream implementation is mapped to the vendored skyfield repository.

review_limitations: The wrapper publishes the six-value `(range, latitude, longitude, range_rate, latitude_rate, longitude_rate)` contract exposed by upstream Skyfield.

atoms.docstring_summary: Zero offset.
review_limitations: `_zero_offset` intentionally ignores the seconds magnitude and returns the additive identity offset.

atoms.docstring_summary: Apply offsets.
review_limitations: `_zero_offset` intentionally ignores the seconds magnitude and returns the additive identity offset.

atoms.docstring_summary: Show.
review_limitations: `_zero_offset` intentionally ignores the seconds magnitude and returns the additive identity offset.

atoms.docstring_summary: Computes transformation paths dynamically using a directed graph representation.
Splits a continuous variable into an integer and fractional part to preserve numerical precision.
Compute the Tempo.jl low-order TT->TDB offset approximation.
Compute the higher-accuracy Tempo.jl TT->TDB offset approximation.
Compute the vectorized TT->TDB offset used by the older d12 ingest.
